The source field l_name (last name) from emp_master maps directly to fullName.lastName based on semantic meaning and field naming convention, despite moderate lexical similarity.

term_dt stores the termination date (null if still active), which directly maps to endDate representing when employment ended, with the same null semantics for active employees.
